completed_steps.summary: Classified as monorepo with 6 parts (3 workspaces + 3 standalone)
Parallel exhaustive scan: astro-app, studio, backends, infra, existing docs via 5 agents
9 docs written directly (source-tree, architecture, project-overview, component-inventory, data-models, api-contracts, development-guide, integration-architecture) from consolidated scan summary
Master index.md generated with links to all new + existing docs
Validation: no 'To be generated' markers; one stray TBD corrected in component-inventory.md

findings_summary.project_classification: Monorepo v1.18.0 (7 releases since prior scan). 6 parts, npm workspaces (astro-app, studio, platform-api) + standalone Cloudflare workers (rate-limiter, event-reminders) + standalone Python discord-bot.
findings_summary.technology_stack: Astro 5.18 + Sanity 5.20 + Tailwind 4.1 + React 19.2 + Better Auth 1.5 + Drizzle 0.45 (D1) + nanostores + @schedule-x + Resend + Astro Fonts API + astro:env + Storybook 10.2 + Vitest 3.2 + Playwright 1.58
findings_summary.new_parts_since_last_scan: event-reminders-worker (production cron), platform-api (scaffold), discord-bot relocated to nested path
findings_summary.notable_features_since_last_scan: astro:env typed schema (5.13); Astro Fonts API self-hosted Inter (22.5); 12-column grid + container queries (17.8); ColumnsBlock (21.10); ImageGallery + PhotoSwipe (22.4); author listing/detail + Person JSON-LD (20.2-20.3); Article JSON-LD (19.6); category archive pages (19.10); newsletter CTA (19.7); listing-page singleton documents (21.0); /projects sorting controls (4.6); sponsor logoSquare/logoHorizontal; Lighthouse+Pa11y CI over /demo/; schema deploy fixed for all 3 workspaces
key_risks: platform-api has placeholder KV/D1 IDs in wrangler.jsonc and is not wired to astro-app
discord-bot/ Python scaffold diverges from the production bot (Workers 'capstone-bot' + 'capstone-ask-worker')
Single D1 shared between astro-app and event-reminders-worker — migrations must stay coordinated
No Husky / pre-commit hooks; CI is the only enforcement gate

production_workers_verified_2026_04_15.name: capstone-ask-worker
